timeline.title: Built Foundations in Computer Applications
timeline.description: Completed BCA while developing skills in programming, web development, databases, and application development through academic and self-driven projects.

timeline.title: Started Professional Backend Development
timeline.description: Worked at Square Bits Pvt. Ltd., progressing from backend trainee to backend engineer while building APIs, payment systems, and workflow-driven SaaS features.

timeline.title: Shifted Toward Product-Oriented Development
timeline.description: Moved beyond routine development work to focus more on solving practical operational problems through software products.

timeline.title: Built S3 Library Platform
timeline.description: Designed and developed a SaaS platform focused on subscriptions, seat management, attendance tracking, and operational workflows for libraries.

timeline.title: Learned Through Real-World Validation
timeline.description: Interacted directly with libraries to validate workflows, understand user behavior, and identify real adoption challenges in operational systems.

timeline.title: Paused to Improve Product Thinking
timeline.description: Paused the project after validation to strengthen technical skills, product understanding, and long-term development direction.

timeline.title: Focused on Backend Systems & Real-Time Applications
timeline.description: Continuing to improve backend-focused full-stack development skills with emphasis on SaaS systems, APIs, workflows, and real-time communication.

timeline.title: Building Practical Software Systems
timeline.description: Focused on creating maintainable applications and workflow-driven systems that solve real operational problems.
